title: operations-live-stream.v1
description: Round 13 R13.1 (2026-05-20). Contract for data/operations-live-stream.json — the per-row events stream consumed by InlineEventsBoard + LiveStreamRailV3. Producer: scripts/generate-operations-live-stream.mjs. The schema pins the load-bearing identity + envelope fields; permissive additionalProperties: true so producer-side additions remain forward-compat. R13.4 will inject the _meta envelope; until then both shapes are accepted.

_meta.description: R13.4 envelope — declared by the producer at generation time. Optional in R13.1 to keep the existing builds passing; R13.4+ will inject it for all producer outputs.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at producer-run time. For tracked freshness snapshots, git_sha may be empty to avoid consumer-commit feedback loops.

producer.description: Producer script path relative to repo root.

git_sha.description: Git commit SHA when safe to stamp. Empty string allowed for dev runs or tracked freshness snapshots where consumer HEAD would create a commit feedback loop.

schema_version.description: Legacy producer-side schema string. R13.4 keeps this in sync with _meta.schema.

stream_id.description: Unique identifier per producer run. Used by readers to detect stale snapshots.

source_mode.description: staged_snapshot | fallback_fixture | generated_public_safe_projection — declares what the reader is seeing.

claim_posture.description: Public-claim-safety descriptor; required by xlooop public claim safety.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; legacy top-level (mirrored into _meta.generated_at by R13.4).

valid_until.description: Optional staleness boundary; readers warn after this.

rows.description: Per-row events. Permissive on row shape: only the identity + lane fields are load-bearing for the UI.
